__fixture__.name: symlink_escape_blocked
__fixture__.scenario: A container-mounted root carries symlink_escape_policy = block. A save-target's canonical path resolves through a symlink to a location outside the trusted container root. The VFS refuses the save with outcome read_only_or_policy_blocked, records the resolution chain in the alias set, and surfaces the policy block instead of a write.
adr_sections: Identity rules: symlink / junction boundary crossings

failure_detail: symlink_escape_blocked: canonical_uri resolves outside the trusted container root /workspaces/project; symlink_escape_policy = block
